inputs.script: echo 'Downloading build artifacts from artifact store'

npm install -g anypoint-cli@latest
response=$(curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -X POST -d '{"client_id":"'$DEV_CLIENT_ID'","client_secret":"'$DEV_CLIENT_SECRET'","grant_type":"client_credentials"}' https://anypoint.mulesoft.com/accounts/api/v2/oauth2/token)
bearer_token=$(echo $response | jq -r '.access_token')
if anypoint-cli runtime-mgr cloudhub-application describe --bearer "$bearer_token" "$DEV_APP_NAME"; then
  anypoint-cli runtime-mgr cloudhub-application modify --bearer "$bearer_token" --runtime "$DEV_RUNTIME" --workers "$DEV_WORKERS" --workerSize "$DEV_WORKER_SIZE" --region "$DEV_REGION" "$DEV_APP_NAME" "$ARTIFACT_PATH"
else
  anypoint-cli runtime-mgr cloudhub-application deploy --bearer "$bearer_token" --runtime "$DEV_RUNTIME" --workers "$DEV_WORKERS" --workerSize "$DEV_WORKER_SIZE" --region "$DEV_REGION" "$DEV_APP_NAME" "$ARTIFACT_PATH"
fi
